player castle/stronghold serves as safe zone anchor

Langrisser sword creation serves as narrative anchor, signifying importance through protagonist focus and quest structure

decisions made during gameplay influence which allies remain closest and which story ending is achieved

notes: Wikipedia source provides minimal visual/manifestation data. Langrisser III uses SNES hardware (16-bit sprite/tile-based graphics typical of tactical RPGs of the era, but specific color palettes, sprite designs, and UI elements not documented in available source). Non-linear relationship system suggests visual communication of affinity through status displays or character animations. Tactical positioning inherent to TRPG genre provides implicit danger/safety signaling through unit placement mechanics. Further documentation would require gameplay footage analysis or developer interviews.
